title: Create: Arm Limit
description: Adds a configurable item limit to the Mechanical Arm choose exactly how many items it picks up instead of always grabbing a full stack.
body:
Extends Create's Mechanical Arm with a customizable pickup count. Instead of always taking 64 items, you can now set any amount giving you precise control over your contraption's item flow.

- Holding the RMB on the gear will open the limit setting window.
- You can also set an item filter and an attribute filter for the robotic arm; this is done to the right of the Distribution Method setting.

I also plan to create a massive mod that will add lots of useful and general quality-of-life (QoL) features to Create and possibly its add-ons, so feel free to leave your QoL ideas—I’ll do my best to implement them in my next mod!

**You can leave your suggestions in the comments section of this mod or in the Issues on GitHub for [Create: Massive QoL](https://github.com/Bzden4ik/Create-Massive-QoL/issues)**
